headline: Episode 12
summary: Headlines include global migration, UK energy, footall and US retail
body_text:
This edition features these stories from ft.com

UK and France vow to increase co-operation after migrant tragedy

UK to put up £1.7bn to support Bulb in special administration

Review calls for radical shake-up of English football

Crowds expected back at malls and stores over Thanksgiving weekend
